testcase.name: interpretAIResponse returns PASS for valid structured AI output
interpretAIResponse returns FAIL when score is below threshold
createMockDecision supports nested required field paths
APIService retries retryable errors and succeeds
APIService does not retry non-retryable 4xx errors
APIService logs expected negative responses as expected failures
APIService throws after retry exhaustion on retryable errors
APIService retries timeout errors and surfaces timeout metadata
parseJSONFromText extracts JSON wrapped with explanation text
parseJSONFromText throws on invalid payload without JSON object
